title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Barbeque Nation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Barbeque Nation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Barbeque Nation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barbeque Nation:
Barbeque Nation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
